purpose: Research repo for the Mission Reachability Audit (MRA): methodology + per-site audits scoring whether declared AX missions are completable end-to-end by a calling agent.
current_focus: MRA v0.1 — methodology in brief.md, audits in audits/, synthesis in README.md. Awaiting codex independent audit + adversarial review.

brief.md.purpose: MRA v0.1 methodology — 5-phase rubric (Discover/Resolve/Internalize/Complete/Verify), scoring conventions, pattern split (principal vs platform-docs).
brief.md.recommended_read_reason: Methodology — read before interpreting any audit

README.md.purpose: Synthesis of v0.1 findings across audited sites; headline conclusions and open methodology questions.
README.md.recommended_read_reason: Findings synthesis — current state of the audit

audits/mczaykowski.com.json.purpose: Audit of mczaykowski.com (principal pattern). Site MRS 2.8.

audits/stripe.com.json.purpose: Audit of stripe.com (platform-docs pattern) against synthetic mission set. Site MRS 2.3.

edit_policy: Methodology changes (brief.md) require explicit version bump. New audits go in audits/<domain>.json. README.md is the synthesis layer — update when adding/removing audits or changing headline findings.
commit_policy: Commit messages reference the MRA version (e.g. 'mra v0.1: ...'). Audit data and methodology in the same commit only when the methodology change forces re-scoring.
